note: Versioned mapping from algorithm/family to standards. This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for compliance verdicts; the engine in compliance.py applies it generically and hardcodes no standard/algorithm verdict. Statuses are advisory engineering signals, not legal determinations. Where a binding requirement cannot be cited, the row uses status 'advisory' and says so.

status_vocabulary.non-compliant: standard requires migrating away from this algorithm
status_vocabulary.below-required-level: standardized, but below the parameter level this standard mandates
status_vocabulary.advisory: transitional/roadmap signal; not a citable binding determination
status_vocabulary.not-applicable: the standard does not govern this algorithm class

FIPS-204.title: ML-DSA (digital signature)
FIPS-204.citation: NIST FIPS 204, Module-Lattice-Based Digital Signature Standard (2024)

FIPS-205.title: SLH-DSA (stateless hash-based signature)
FIPS-205.citation: NIST FIPS 205, Stateless Hash-Based Digital Signature Standard (2024)

CNSA-2.0.title: NSA Commercial National Security Algorithm Suite 2.0
CNSA-2.0.citation: NSA, CNSA 2.0 (2022); for NSS, specifies ML-KEM-1024 and ML-DSA-87 (Category 5) and deprecates classical PKC

EU-PQC-ROADMAP.title: EU coordinated PQC transition
EU-PQC-ROADMAP.citation: EU Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for the transition to PQC (2025); coordination guidance, NOT binding regulation; member-state timelines vary

FIPS-203.rationale: RSA is not an ML-KEM algorithm.

FIPS-204.rationale: RSA is not an ML-DSA algorithm.

CNSA-2.0.rationale: Classical RSA; CNSA 2.0 mandates migration to PQC for NSS.

EU-PQC-ROADMAP.rationale: Quantum-vulnerable; flagged for transition by the EU roadmap (timeline advisory).

FIPS-204.rationale: Classical ECDSA is not an ML-DSA algorithm.

CNSA-2.0.rationale: Classical ECDSA signature; CNSA 2.0 mandates migration to ML-DSA.

FIPS-203.rationale: Classical ECDH is not an ML-KEM algorithm.

CNSA-2.0.rationale: Classical ECDH/X25519 key exchange; CNSA 2.0 mandates migration to ML-KEM.
Classical finite-field DH; CNSA 2.0 mandates migration to ML-KEM.
Classical EdDSA signature; CNSA 2.0 mandates migration to ML-DSA.

FIPS-203.rationale: ML-KEM is the FIPS 203 KEM standard.

CNSA-2.0.rationale: CNSA 2.0 specifies ML-KEM-1024 (Category 5) for NSS; this parameter set is below that level.

EU-PQC-ROADMAP.rationale: PQC KEM aligned with the transition target.

CNSA-2.0.rationale: Meets CNSA 2.0's ML-KEM-1024 (Category 5) requirement for NSS.

EU-PQC-ROADMAP.rationale: PQC KEM aligned with the transition target.

FIPS-204.rationale: ML-DSA is the FIPS 204 signature standard.

CNSA-2.0.rationale: CNSA 2.0 specifies ML-DSA-87 (Category 5) for NSS; this parameter set is below that level.

EU-PQC-ROADMAP.rationale: PQC signature aligned with the transition target.

CNSA-2.0.rationale: Meets CNSA 2.0's ML-DSA-87 (Category 5) requirement for NSS.

EU-PQC-ROADMAP.rationale: PQC signature aligned with the transition target.

FIPS-203.rationale: Hybrid (ML-KEM-768 + X25519): embeds a FIPS 203 component but the hybrid construction itself is not a FIPS standard.

CNSA-2.0.rationale: Transitional hybrid; CNSA 2.0 targets standalone ML-KEM-1024 for NSS.

EU-PQC-ROADMAP.rationale: Hybrid PQC commonly recommended for the transition period.
